title: hieracium eriophorum subsp. eriophorum
intro: Hieracium eriophorum subsp. eriophorum is a plant species also known as the woolly hawk's beard or woolly Jacobs ladder, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium eriophorum subsp. eriophorum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal activity, making it a useful remedy for various skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of Hieracium eriophorum subsp. eriophorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
